dict.string: We use your location to record trips, calculate distance and speed, and provide trip summaries and driving insights.
We use your location in the background to automatically detect and record trips without requiring manual interaction.
We use motion data to detect driving activity and identify events such as acceleration, braking, and turns to improve trip accuracy.
The application uses the camera to record video during the trip (dashcam mode).
The application can record audio along with video upon your request.
The application saves videos to the device's memory.
